red_lines: Threats to Turkish military operations in Syria/Iraq
Aegean and Eastern Mediterranean territorial challenges

decision_history.event_description: Expanded Turkish military operations in northern Syria after Assad regime fell
decision_history.decision_taken: Increased presence in northern Syria, supported allied factions, maintained pressure on Kurdish forces
decision_history.outcome: Extended Turkish buffer zone, complicated US relations over Kurdish allies

decision_history.event_description: Continued unconventional monetary policy with eventual rate hikes
decision_history.decision_taken: Allowed central bank to raise rates significantly to combat inflation after years of resistance
decision_history.outcome: Inflation beginning to stabilize, economic pain for base offset by stability narrative

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: AKP party, conservative religious base, Anatolian business class, nationalist voters

military_posture.force_disposition: NATO second-largest army with regional expeditionary capability
